name: Authelia
description: Authelia is an open-source authentication and authorization server providing two-factor authentication and single sign-on (SSO) for your applications via a web portal. It acts as a companion for reverse proxies to protect your applications.

paths.name: Data
paths.description: Persistent data storage for users, sessions, and TOTP secrets.

ports.name: WebUI
ports.description: Authelia web portal and API port.

variables.name: Authelia JWT Secret
variables.description: Secret key for JWT token generation. Generate with: openssl rand -hex 32

variables.name: Session Secret
variables.description: Secret key for session encryption. Generate with: openssl rand -hex 32

variables.name: Storage Encryption Key
variables.description: Encryption key for storage. Generate with: openssl rand -hex 32
